title: The women using ancient dance to tell new stories
description: Anne Tiburtius says her dance company is a "living example" of how art can break down barriers.

title: ‘Big Dig’ aims to uncover Burnley’s ancient roots with new funding
description: Burnley and Nelson Big Dig has secured over £100,000 from The National Lottery Heritage Fund to support a major community archaeology project

title: The Black Pharaohs of Ancient Egypt
description: Netflix’s Queen Cleopatra docuseries has caused an immense storm of controversy surrounding its depiction of Cleopatra VII Philopator as a black woman, and whilst Cleopatra herself was not black, there were indeed black pharaohs who ruled over Egypt at one point in the 8th and 7th centuries BC. The 25th Dynasty, also known as the Nubian Dynasty, or Black Pharaohs, ruled Egypt between 744 BC and 656 BC as part of the wider Kushite Empire. The 25th Dynasty originated from the city-state of Napata in Nubia, in what is today Sudan. The Nubian Kushite civilization, from whom the 25th Dynasty...
